overview.what: A high-performance URL shortening service that provides custom short links and detailed click analytics. It uses Redis for ultra-fast redirection and storage of hit counts.
overview.how_it_works: The API generates a unique short ID using `nanoid` and stores the mapping in a Redis hash. When a user visits the short URL, the server performs an O(1) lookup in Redis, increments a click counter, and performs a 301 redirection to the original URL.
what_you_learn: Using Redis for high-speed key-value storage
